---
title: "Marcus Anderson"
name: "Marcus Anderson"
image: "/images/profile_pics/marcus_anderson.jpg"
research: "**Research subject:** Correlates of risk-averse foraging in army-ant following birds"
location: "**Research location:** Panama"
dates: "**Dates:** 2024-present"
category: "Current"
category_order: "6"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
